items.headline: U.S. Equities Edge Higher Amid Moderate Sentiment
items.summary: U.S. equity markets closed higher on Friday, with stock indexes settling higher and the S&P 500 posting a 5-week high. Investor sentiment, as measured by the Fear and Greed Index, is currently neutral, rising 2 points to 49. Pessimism among individual investors decreased, while optimism and neutral sentiment saw an increase, with bullish sentiment rising 4.9 percentage points to 36.3%.

items.headline: Meta Platforms Inc. Class A surges
items.summary: META experienced a strong rally today, reflecting positive investor sentiment in the technology sector.

items.headline: NVIDIA Corp continues upward trend
items.summary: The chipmaker NVIDIA showed significant gains, contributing to the broader tech sector's performance.

items.headline: Crown Castle Inc. climbs
items.summary: CCI saw a notable increase today, indicating strength in the communications infrastructure segment.

items.headline: TAAG Freedom Holdings Inc. tumbles
items.summary: TAAG Freedom Holdings Inc. recorded a substantial decline, making it one of today's biggest losers.

items.headline: Lion Group Holding Ltd. falls sharply
items.summary: Lion Group Holding Ltd. experienced a significant drop in its stock price today.

items.headline: Aurelion Inc. slides
items.summary: Aurelion Inc. was among the top decliners, with its stock price falling considerably.

items.headline: June CPI Report Shows Moderating Inflation
items.summary: The Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS) released data showing the year-over-year CPI inflation rate at 3.0% for June, with core CPI at 3.3%. The one-month change from May to June, annualized, was a negative 0.7% for headline CPI, suggesting a disinflationary trend. These readings remain above the Fed's 2% target.

items.headline: Nonfarm Payrolls Increase, Unemployment Ticks Up
items.summary: Nonfarm payrolls increased by 206,000 jobs in June, with the unemployment rate ticking up to 4.1% from 4.0% in May. This indicates a cooling trend in the labor market.

items.headline: Fed Awaits More Data Amid Rate Cut Expectations
items.summary: Federal Reserve Chair Powell indicated the Fed requires 'more good data' before considering rate cuts. Market expectations show a 73% chance of a rate reduction at the September meeting.

items.headline: Select Companies Report Earnings
items.summary: JINS Holdings Inc., AKER BIOMARINE, Corem Property Group AB Class B, and AVARDA are among the companies scheduled to report earnings today.
